buildCommand: pnpm run build && cp -f builds/server.js vercel-server.js && cp -f public/index.html public/index.html.bak && cp -f public/dailyship.css public/dailyship.css.bak 2>/dev/null || true && if [ -f public/dailyship.css ]; then mv public/dailyship.css public/dailyship-styles.css; fi && sed -i 's/dailyship\.css/dailyship-styles.css/g' public/index.html && node scripts/stage-vercel-public.mjs && cp -f public/index.html.bak public/index.html && cp -f public/dailyship.css.bak public/dailyship.css 2>/dev/null || true && rm -f public/index.html.bak public/dailyship.css.bak
